input.content:
Bead ddx-7e7b12f0 is already satisfied by commit 3b0fefc1 ("test(web): e2e
regression check for doc graph edge color tokens [ddx-7e7b12f0]"), which is an
ancestor of HEAD in this worktree. The required test file is present at
cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts
and contains:

  AC1: file exists at the specified route path (verified by `git ls-files`).
  AC2: asserts >=1 <line> SVG edge via `expect(edges.first()).toBeAttached()`
       and `expect(await edges.count()).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(1)`.
  AC3: asserts edge stroke and arrow marker fill resolve to rgb(75, 85, 99)
       (#4B5563) in the default light theme; uses an addInitScript pre-load to
       clear any persisted .dark class for determinism.
  AC4: toggles document.documentElement.classList.add('dark') and re-asserts
       both stroke and marker fill resolve to rgb(184, 175, 156) (#B8AF9C).
  AC5: file is wired into the existing playwright project (sibling of
       drain.e2e.ts / personas.e2e.ts) and uses the same in-test page.route
       GraphQL mocking pattern, so `bun run test:e2e` discovers and runs it.

The previous BLOCKING reviews compared only the most recent attempt's diff and
correctly noticed it contained no test file — that is because the file was
already committed in an earlier attempt and there was nothing left to add.
There is no remaining code change to make for this bead.

The verification command below proves the file is present at the expected path
and contains the four token-string assertions that AC2-AC4 require.

verification_command: test -f "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts" && grep -q "rgb(75, 85, 99)" "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts" && grep -q "rgb(184, 175, 156)" "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts" && grep -q "svg.locator('line')" "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts" && grep -q "classList.add('dark')" "cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts"
